## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (`vitest` + `vitest-axe` where relevant)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` and `pnpm format:check` pass
- [ ] `pnpm exec turbo run build test typecheck` passes
- [ ] A changeset added if this changes a published package (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] Docs/demo updated for new or changed components
